This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] Animate from legacy rgb to oklch
  assert_true: Actual value rgb(255, 0, 0) not recognized as an oklab color expected true got false
[FAIL] Animate from legacy rgb to color-mix oklch
  assert_true: Actual value rgb(255, 0, 0) not recognized as an oklab color expected true got false
